Steps 1–3 are a working API; 4 onward is hardening.
One flag: this design assumes the todos are private to one user. If multiple people will ever share a list, decide the ownership and visibility model
retrofitting per-user scoping onto a populated database means a data migration plus auditing every query, which is a much larger job than including
